ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the store */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the store */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the store is active */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_stores" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the customer and the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the allocation is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_stores_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_stores_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the product is stocked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (customer or store) that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that was performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., customer allocation, store performance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
